testcase.name: verify_login

failure.message: Test failed: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //input[@id=input-email'] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//input[@id=input-email']' is not a valid XPath expression. (Session info: chrome=143.0.7499.148) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalid-selector-exception Build info: version: '4.27.0', revision: 'd6e718d134' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [6e696f20b74fbab8d7bf352231ab629d, findElement {value=//input[@id=input-email'], using=xpath}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 143.0.7499.148, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 143.0.7499.169 (164b20aab62..., userDataDir: C:\Users\padma\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:58577}, goog:processID: 11084, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:58577/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 143.0.7499.148, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 6e696f20b74fbab8d7bf352231ab629d
